2025-26 Washington Wizards Roster and Stats

Previous Season

Record: 17-65, Finished 15th in NBA Eastern Conference

Coach: Brian Keefe (17-65)

Executive: Michael Winger

PTS/G: 112.9 (25th of 30) Opp PTS/G: 124.9 (29th of 30)

SRS: -11.62 (30th of 30) Pace: 101.4 (6th of 30)

Off Rtg: 111.0 (28th of 30) Def Rtg: 122.7 (30th of 30) Net Rtg: -11.8 (30th of 30)

Expected W-L: 16-66 (30th of 30)

Preseason Odds: Championship +100000, Over-Under 20.5

Arena: Capital One Arena Attendance: 660,376 (29th of 30)
